english translation text: Lafz Main Apkay Shayan Kahan Say LaoonWhere Do I Find The Words Worthy Of YouAbu-talib Ka Qalamdan Kahan Say LaoonWhere Can I Find Abu-talib's Wordsmanship
Loge Kehtay Hain Karoon Apkee Midhat AaqaPeople Are Saying That I Should Sing Your Praise Our Main Lehjaye-quran Kahan Say LaoonAnd Where Do I Find The Words Like Quran
Aapkee Aal Kee Pehchan Nahee Dunya KoThe World Does Not Know Your FamilyDeedaye Boozar-o-salman Kahan Say LaoonWhere Do I Find The Likes Of Abuzar And Salman
Aap Kay Hukm Ko Jo Hukm-khuda Mantay HainThose Who Take Your Words As The Word Of GodAaj Main Aisay Musalman Kahan Say LaoonWhere Can I Find The Muslims Like That Today
Aap Kee Naat To Likhnee Hay Magar Sonchta HoonI Would Like To Write A Poem In Your Honour ButMain Bhala Doosra Quran Kahan Say LaoonWhere Can I Find The Likes Of A Quran
Kho Gaya Ishq-mohammad Main Baree Dair HoweeI Was Lost In The Love Of Mohammad For A WhileApna Dil Dhoond Kay Rehan Kahan Say LaoonRehan Where Do I Find My Heart
